visual-anti-patterns.notes: Purple-to-blue gradient covers the entire landing hero; some secondary text (gallery byline, category pills) appears below 16px

visual-child-friendly.notes: Playful emoji-rich UI with suggestion chips, themed environments, and friendly AI buddy tone; some category tabs and object tiles are compact for small fingers

visual-consistency.notes: Main flow (landing, builder, gallery) shares purple/orange accents and rounded shapes, but save-after-reload page diverges sharply with different color scheme, layout, AI buddy name, and button styles

visual-accessibility.notes: Focus/selection rings visible on object tiles and theme chips; most items have text labels; but undo/redo are icon-only, landing gradient undermines text contrast, and no evidence of responsive narrow-width layout
